message:
feat(abi): promote hosts database iteration from host delegation to native

Replace 4 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- sethostent/endhostent/gethostent — thread-local /etc/hosts iterator
  with IPv4/IPv6 binary address conversion
- gethostent_r — reentrant variant packing hostent struct with address
  list and alias list into caller-supplied buffers

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 21 → 17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
